figures.caption: Fig. 2. Top row (2D FORBILD): Image MSE plots for INR training with FFNs, SIREN, and hash encoding, comparing auto-differentiation and gradient approximation (for both LS and FLS). Bottom row (3D Walnut): Image MSE plots for INR training with FFNs, SIREN, and hash encoding using gradient approximation (for both LS and FLS).

Fig. 1. 2D FORBILD sparse-view reconstructions obtained with conjugate gradient least squares (CGLS) and filtered backprojection (FBP), alongside reconstructions produced by training an INR using FFNs, SIREN, and Hash Encoding architectures. All images are shown on the scale [0.0200,0.0220] mm−1.
